justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but could have offered more options in the first turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent minimized unnecessary turns and did not ask for information the user had already provided.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, and the agent successfully booked the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and expanded the search intelligently after the initial unavailability.
